script_text: Writers pick words that sing. Words with a beat and sounds.
Some words rhyme. Some words bounce.
Let us listen to a few.
Rhymes are words that sound the same at the end.
Cat and hat. Boom and zoom. Rhymes!
A beat is when lines have the same number of claps.
Some words pull in our senses.
The warm sun kissed her face. We feel warm!
The thunder boomed. We hear it!
Read poems out loud. You will hear the music!
Now you are ready to hear words that sing!
